serverInfo.name: sap.mcp/connections
serverInfo.title: connections
serverInfo.description: MCP server for the connections service.

tools.name: RetrieveConnectionOfSpace
tools.description: Returns the definition of a connection in a space (without its credentials).

tools.name: UpdateConnectionInSpace
tools.description: Updates a connection in a space.

tools.name: DeleteConnectionInSpace
tools.description: Deletes a connection from a space.

tools.name: ValidateConnectionInSpace
tools.description: Validates a connection in a space.

tools.name: ListConnectionsInSpace
tools.description: Returns a list of connections available in a space.

tools.name: CreateConnectionInSpace
tools.description: Creates a connection in a space.
